name: Maya Action: Import Alembic
description: Creates a Maya action to import an Alembic (.abc) cache file directly into the scene. Chain multiple action nodes together via actions_in/actions_out, then feed the final actions_out into a Maya Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    abc_path = inputs.get('abc_path') or self.get_parameter('abc_path', '')

    action = {
        'type': 'import_alembic',
        'abc_path': abc_path
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added import_alembic action for: {abc_path}')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
